xml.parsers.expat.model/expat/XMLParserT.name: XMLParserType
xml.parsers.expat.model/expat/XMLParserT.description: The type of the return values from the ParserCreate() function.

info.excerpt: The type of the return values from the ParserCreate() function.

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_NONE.name: XML_CQUANT_NONE
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_NONE.description: No modifier is given, so it can appear exactly once, as for A.

info.excerpt: No modifier is given, so it can appear exactly once, as for A.

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_OPT.name: XML_CQUANT_OPT
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_OPT.description: The model is optional: it can appear once or not at all, as for A?.

info.excerpt: The model is optional: it can appear once or not at all, as for A?.

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_PLUS.name: XML_CQUANT_PLUS
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_PLUS.description: The model must occur one or more times (like A+).

info.excerpt: The model must occur one or more times (like A+).

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_REP.name: XML_CQUANT_REP
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CQUANT_REP.description: The model must occur zero or more times, as for A*.

info.excerpt: The model must occur zero or more times, as for A*.

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_ANY.name: XML_CTYPE_ANY
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_ANY.description: The element named by the model name was declared to have a content model of ANY.

info.excerpt: The element named by the model name was declared to have a content model of ANY.

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_CHOICE.name: XML_CTYPE_CHOICE
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_CHOICE.description: The named element allows a choice from a number of options; this is used for content models such as (A | B | C).

info.excerpt: The named element allows a choice from a number of options; this is used for content models such as (A | B | C).

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_EMPTY.name: XML_CTYPE_EMPTY
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_EMPTY.description: Elements which are declared to be EMPTY have this model type.

info.excerpt: Elements which are declared to be EMPTY have this model type.

xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_SEQ.name: XML_CTYPE_SEQ
xml.parsers.expat.model/XML_CTYPE_SEQ.description: Models which represent a series of models which follow one after the other are indicated with this model type. This is used for models such as (A, B, C).

info.excerpt: Models which represent a series of models which follow one after the other are indicated with this model type. This is used for models such as (A, B, C).

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_ABORTED
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: This should not be reported to Python applications.

info.excerpt: This should not be reported to Python applications.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_AMPLIFICATION_LIMIT_BREACH
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The limit on input amplification factor (from DTD and entities) has been breached.

info.excerpt: The limit on input amplification factor (from DTD and entities) has been breached.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_ATTRIBUTE_EXTERNAL_ENTITY_REF
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An entity reference in an attribute value referred to an external entity instead of an internal entity.

info.excerpt: An entity reference in an attribute value referred to an external entity instead of an internal entity.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_BAD_CHAR_REF
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: A character reference referred to a character which is illegal in XML (for example, character 0, or ‘�’).

info.excerpt: A character reference referred to a character which is illegal in XML (for example, character 0, or ‘�’).

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_BINARY_ENTITY_REF
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An entity reference referred to an entity which was declared with a notation, so cannot be parsed.

info.excerpt: An entity reference referred to an entity which was declared with a notation, so cannot be parsed.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_CANT_CHANGE_FEATURE_ONCE_PARSING
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: A behavioral change was requested after parsing started that can only be changed before parsing has started. This is (currently) only raised by UseForeignDTD().

info.excerpt: A behavioral change was requested after parsing started that can only be changed before parsing has started. This is (currently) only raised by UseForeignDTD().

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_DUPLICATE_ATTRIBUTE
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An attribute was used more than once in a start tag.

info.excerpt: An attribute was used more than once in a start tag.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_FEATURE_REQUIRES_XML_DTD
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An operation was requested that requires DTD support to be compiled in, but Expat was configured without DTD support. This should never be reported by a standard build of the xml.parsers.expat module.

info.excerpt: An operation was requested that requires DTD support to be compiled in, but Expat was configured without DTD support. This should never be reported by a standard build of the xml.parsers.expat module.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_FINISHED
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The requested operation was made on a parser which was finished parsing input, but isn’t allowed. This includes attempts to provide additional input or to stop the parser.

info.excerpt: The requested operation was made on a parser which was finished parsing input, but isn’t allowed. This includes attempts to provide additional input or to stop the parser.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_INCOMPLETE_PE
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: A parameter entity contained incomplete markup.

info.excerpt: A parameter entity contained incomplete markup.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_INVALID_ARGUMENT
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: This should not be reported to Python applications.

info.excerpt: This should not be reported to Python applications.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_INVALID_TOKEN
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: Raised when an input byte could not properly be assigned to a character; for example, a NUL byte (value 0) in a UTF-8 input stream.

info.excerpt: Raised when an input byte could not properly be assigned to a character; for example, a NUL byte (value 0) in a UTF-8 input stream.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_JUNK_AFTER_DOC_ELEMENT
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: Something other than whitespace occurred after the document element.

info.excerpt: Something other than whitespace occurred after the document element.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_MISPLACED_XML_PI
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An XML declaration was found somewhere other than the start of the input data.

info.excerpt: An XML declaration was found somewhere other than the start of the input data.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_NOT_STANDALONE
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The parser determined that the document was not “standalone” though it declared itself to be in the XML declaration, and the NotStandaloneHandler was set and returned 0.

info.excerpt: The parser determined that the document was not “standalone” though it declared itself to be in the XML declaration, and the NotStandaloneHandler was set and returned 0.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_NOT_STARTED
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The parser was tried to be stopped or suspended before it started. Added in version 3.14.

info.excerpt: The parser was tried to be stopped or suspended before it started. Added in version 3.14.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_NOT_SUSPENDED
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An attempt to resume the parser was made when the parser had not been suspended.

info.excerpt: An attempt to resume the parser was made when the parser had not been suspended.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_NO_BUFFER
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: This should not be reported to Python applications.

info.excerpt: This should not be reported to Python applications.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_NO_ELEMENTS
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The document contains no elements (XML requires all documents to contain exactly one top-level element)..

info.excerpt: The document contains no elements (XML requires all documents to contain exactly one top-level element)..

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_NO_MEMORY
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: Expat was not able to allocate memory internally.

info.excerpt: Expat was not able to allocate memory internally.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_PARAM_ENTITY_REF
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: A parameter entity reference was found where it was not allowed.

info.excerpt: A parameter entity reference was found where it was not allowed.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_PARTIAL_CHAR
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An incomplete character was found in the input.

info.excerpt: An incomplete character was found in the input.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_PUBLICID
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: Characters were found in the public id that are not allowed.

info.excerpt: Characters were found in the public id that are not allowed.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_RECURSIVE_ENTITY_REF
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An entity reference contained another reference to the same entity; possibly via a different name, and possibly indirectly.

info.excerpt: An entity reference contained another reference to the same entity; possibly via a different name, and possibly indirectly.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_RESERVED_NAMESPACE_URI
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An attempt was made to bind the URI of one the reserved namespace prefixes xml and xmlns to another namespace prefix.

info.excerpt: An attempt was made to bind the URI of one the reserved namespace prefixes xml and xmlns to another namespace prefix.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_RESERVED_PREFIX_XML
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An attempt was made to undeclare reserved namespace prefix xml or to bind it to another namespace URI.

info.excerpt: An attempt was made to undeclare reserved namespace prefix xml or to bind it to another namespace URI.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_RESERVED_PREFIX_XMLNS
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An attempt was made to declare or undeclare reserved namespace prefix xmlns.

info.excerpt: An attempt was made to declare or undeclare reserved namespace prefix xmlns.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_SUSPENDED
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The requested operation was made on a suspended parser, but isn’t allowed. This includes attempts to provide additional input or to stop the parser.

info.excerpt: The requested operation was made on a suspended parser, but isn’t allowed. This includes attempts to provide additional input or to stop the parser.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_SYNTAX
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: Some unspecified syntax error was encountered.

info.excerpt: Some unspecified syntax error was encountered.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_TAG_MISMATCH
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An end tag did not match the innermost open start tag.

info.excerpt: An end tag did not match the innermost open start tag.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_TEXT_DECL
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: There was an error parsing a text declaration in an external entity.

info.excerpt: There was an error parsing a text declaration in an external entity.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_UNBOUND_PREFIX
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: An undeclared prefix was found when namespace processing was enabled.

info.excerpt: An undeclared prefix was found when namespace processing was enabled.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_UNCLOSED_CDATA_SECTION
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: A CDATA marked section was not closed.

info.excerpt: A CDATA marked section was not closed.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_UNCLOSED_TOKEN
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: Some token (such as a start tag) was not closed before the end of the stream or the next token was encountered.

info.excerpt: Some token (such as a start tag) was not closed before the end of the stream or the next token was encountered.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_UNDECLARING_PREFIX
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The document attempted to remove the namespace declaration associated with a prefix.

info.excerpt: The document attempted to remove the namespace declaration associated with a prefix.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_UNDEFINED_ENTITY
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: A reference was made to an entity which was not defined.

info.excerpt: A reference was made to an entity which was not defined.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_UNKNOWN_ENCODING
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The document encoding is not supported by Expat.

info.excerpt: The document encoding is not supported by Expat.

xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.name: XML_ERROR_XML_DECL
xml.parsers.expat.model/errors/XML_ERROR.description: The document contained no document element at all.

info.excerpt: The document contained no document element at all.

xml.parsers.expat.model/xmlparser/XmlDec.name: XmlDeclHandler
xml.parsers.expat.model/xmlparser/XmlDec.description: Called when the XML declaration is parsed. The XML declaration is the (optional) declaration of the applicable version of the XML recommendation, the encoding of the document text, and an optional “standalone” declaration. version and encoding will be strings, and standalone will be 1 if the document is declared standalone, 0 if it is declared not to be standalone, or -1 if the standalone clause was omitted. This is only available with Expat version 1.95.0 or newer.

info.excerpt: Called when the XML declaration is parsed. The XML declaration is the (optional) declaration of the applicable version of the XML recommendation, the encoding of the document text, and an optional “st...
